creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matthias Andree from comment #2)
> Download the *.log.lz file. Install lzip. Use "lzip -d" to uncompress the downloaded file. Then read the *.log file.

Well, there are about half a dozen compression utilities in the base system, in the future, if you want the people you report bugs to to actually be able to see what the problem is, you might want to use one of them.
